summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Eunoia anti-AI-therapy peer support platform. Backend APIs working at 95% success rate, frontend UI fully functional with complete user flows from signup to profile generation.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed instead of 200

integration_issues.issue: Profile page may not load if user hasn't completed full assessment or written 3 qualifying reflections
Crisis modal showed 0 helplines for IN locale

passed_tests: Landing page renders with correct hero text and CTA
Signup flow with email, locale, and role selection
Login flow works with passwordless authentication
Onboarding shows 3 consent toggles with proper defaults
Assessment displays 25 questions with progress bar and auto-advance
Navbar appears on authenticated pages with all navigation links
Circles page lists 4 forums with tags and member counts
Circle thread shows compose box with live moderation preview
Companion journal with textarea, word counter, and save functionality
Data Cooperative settings with contribution summary and consent toggles
Get Help Now button opens crisis modal
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix data export endpoint (405 error) and verify crisis helplines are properly configured for all locales. Consider adding better user guidance for profile generation requirements.
